title: SEMAX
description: Semax is a Russian peptide derived from ACTH with potent nootropic and neuroprotective effects. It increases BDNF, enhances cognitive function, and is approved in Russia for stroke, cognitive disorders, and peptic ulcers.

research.title: The efficacy of semax in the tretament of patients at different stages of ischemic stroke
research.summary: Early rehabilitation and semax administration increased BDNF levels in post-stroke patients, improving motor performance.

research.title: Effectiveness of semax in acute period of hemispheric ischemic stroke
research.summary: Semax at doses of 12-18 mg improved neurological function and motor skills in acute ischemic stroke patients.

research.title: Semax, synthetic ACTH(4–10) analogue, attenuates behavioural and neurochemical alterations following early-life fluvoxamine exposure
research.summary: Semax mitigated behavioral and biochemical complications from neonatal SSRI exposure in rats.

research.title: Semax, an ACTH4-10 peptide analog with high affinity for copper(II) ion and protective ability against metal induced cell toxicity
research.summary: Semax binds metal ions and reduces copper-induced toxicity in nerve cells.

research.title: Influence of the N-terminus acetylation of Semax on copper(II) and zinc(II) coordination
research.summary: Acetyl-modified Semax altered metal ion binding but may have potential future applications in cancer therapies.

research.title: Semax, an analogue of adrenocorticotropin (4–10), for the treatment of attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder
research.summary: Researchers propose Semax as an alternative to psychostimulants for ADHD treatment.

research.title: Degradation of ACTH/MSH(4–10) and its synthetic analog semax by rat serum enzymes
research.summary: Aminopeptidases and angiotensin-converting enzyme primarily degrade Semax in rat serum.

research.title: Semax as a Universal Drug for Therapy and Research
research.summary: Review analyzing 1980-2016 data on Semax's benefits including anxiety reduction and cognitive enhancement.

research.title: Meta-analysis: Semax effectiveness in the acute period of stroke
research.summary: Semax significantly reduced stroke severity and improved mobility compared to placebo.

research.title: Experimental Substantiation of Application of Semax as a Modulator of Immune Reaction
research.summary: Semax effectively restored immune balance in socially stressed laboratory animals.

sentiment.summary: Highly effective for focus and mental clarity. Users report significant cognitive enhancement and neuroprotection. More stimulating than selank; some prefer combining both.

effects.label: Fast Acting:
effects.description: Effects often felt within 30 minutes intranasally.

effects.label: Synergy:
effects.description: Often combined with selank for balanced effects.

dosage.label: N-Acetyl Semax:
dosage.description: More potent variant requiring lower doses.

sideEffects.label: Stimulation:
sideEffects.description: May be too stimulating for some users.

sideEffects.label: Hair Loss:
sideEffects.description: Rare reports; may be from BDNF effects on hair cycle.

availability.label: Russian Medication:
availability.description: Approved and widely used in Russia.

availability.label: Multiple Forms:
availability.description: Available as standard semax or N-Acetyl variant.
